View online
 | My Account


LEGO® fun is headed your way!

Hi Joshua,

Great news! Your LEGO® order is on its way! Your tracking number is listed below, and you can click on the link to view the progress of your shipment:
https://www.ups.com/track?loc=en_us&tracknum=1Z0V069A0382992440
1Z0V069A0382992440Please note that it may take up to 24 hours for you to see the tracking info.

 You can also easily check the status of your order online at any time. Simply click on your name in the top right corner of
https://lego.com
LEGO.com to view your LEGO account and you’ll find your orders listed there. If you don’t have an account, you can still check your order’s status. Visit our Order Status page
https://www.lego.com/page/static/orders
here to get the info you need.

 If you’d like to return or exchange an online order, please click
https://www.lego.com/en-us/service
here.

 You can also return items purchased from
https://lego.com
LEGO.com in a LEGO Store as long as what you’re returning is less than $200 in total. You can make an exchange or receive a store credit, and you’ll need to show this email, so don’t forget to bring it with you.

 To read more about our in-store return policy, take a look
https://www.lego.com/page/shipping-handling
here.

If you ordered something from Pick a Brick, your items will be sent separately. Bestseller pieces should arrive within 5 business days from the date you placed your order. And standard pieces should arrive 28 business days from when you ordered them.

Happy building LEGO Customer Service

ORDER STATUS

If your order was paid using a credit card, debit card, Apple Pay, or gift card, we will be authorising it shortly, but no charge will be made until your order is shipped. If you used PayPal, you’ll be charged once your item(s) are available in our warehouse. If we are unable to obtain authorisation, we will contact you. Please note that your bank may hold these funds temporarily as part of the authorisation process. Stock levels may differ between the time you submit your order and the time it is processed. If any of your items are on backorder, you will be notified in a separate email.

 *All orders are subject to review which may affect shipping times.

https://www.lego.com/service
